content.text: Good morning everyone. Let's discuss the Q2 roadmap and the priorities for the next sprint.
Sure. I think we should focus on the authentication service refactor first. It's blocking three other teams.
Agreed. The dependency on the legacy auth module is the biggest risk right now. We need to migrate by end of April.
I can take the lead on the migration plan. Should have a draft by Thursday.
Perfect. Let's also talk about the mobile app timeline. Marketing is asking for a launch date.
We're targeting June first for the beta. Full launch in July if testing goes well.
That works. I'll sync with the QA team on the testing schedule. Any other items for today?
One more thing. We got approval on the budget increase for cloud infrastructure. That's effective next month.
